default_tasks.description: Scott's daily tech and AI news briefing — every morning at 6am

config.goal: Collect and synthesize today's tech and AI news briefing. Cover at least 3 independent source categories. Save the briefing to memory with today's date.

default_tasks.description: Nightly Security Sentinel audit — reads EventLog, classifies violations and anomalies, writes digest to memory

config.goal: Run the nightly security audit. Read the EventLog for the past 24 hours, classify any policy violations or behavioral anomalies, compare against the 7-day baseline, and write a structured security digest to memory using key 'security/digest_<today>'. Follow the digest format in your system prompt exactly.
